validation_error: There was a validation error. Please check the entered information and try again.
unexpected_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
network_error: Network error. Please check your internet connection and try again.
update_not_found: The item to update was not found or has already been deleted.
delete_failed: Failed to delete the data. Please try again.
delete_not_found: The requested item was not found or has already been deleted.
delete_related_entities: This item cannot be deleted because it is linked to other data. Please remove or unlink the related data first.
